description: Companion output profile for bounded safe deferral guidance, Class 2 clarification candidate presentation, outbound notifications, audit logging, governance evidence reporting, and local warning outputs. This asset complements but does not override canonical policy or schema truth.

voice_feedback.policy_linkage_note: Voice feedback may support bounded safe deferral guidance, Class 2 clarification candidate presentation, transition status feedback, and system status communication, but it must not become an open-ended dialogue path or override policy-controlled routing outcomes.
voice_feedback.purpose: Cloud-independent bounded voice guidance for safe deferral feedback, Class 2 clarification prompts, and limited system announcements

outbound_notification.caregiver_confirmation_note: Class 1 caregiver confirmation support remains bounded by the canonical low-risk action catalog. Caregiver-mediated approval for sensitive actions, if implemented, belongs to a separate governed manual confirmation path and must not be treated as autonomous low-risk execution.
outbound_notification.clarification_boundary_note: Class 2 clarification interaction payloads may describe candidate choices, selection results, timeout/no-response results, transition targets, and final safe outcomes, but they must not be treated as validator approval, actuation commands, emergency trigger evidence, or doorlock authorization.
outbound_notification.companion_asset_note: This output profile describes preferred output behavior and channel use, but notification payload contracts remain governed by the canonical Class 2 notification schema and clarification interaction records remain governed by the canonical clarification interaction schema.
outbound_notification.purpose: Caregiver alerts, bounded escalation payload delivery, Class 2 clarification transition notification, and limited approval-path support

local_warning_output.scope_note: Local warning outputs are policy-controlled safety outputs and should not be interpreted as equivalent to the Class 1 low-risk autonomous actuation taxonomy.
local_warning_output.purpose: Bounded local warning outputs for emergency or safety-critical feedback under policy control

governance_output_note: Governance reports such as interface-matrix alignment reports, topic-drift reports, payload validation reports, clarification interaction validation reports, and proposed-change reports are verification/evidence artifacts and must not be treated as operational authorization, policy authority, schema authority, caregiver approval authority, Class 2 transition authority, or actuation authority.
